mapper.select: SELECT p.perms FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 0 INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id AND rp.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = 0
